title: ‘The closest thing to an iPad Air in Android form’ — I was impressed by the Samsung Galaxy Tab S11, but there’s one area where it can't beat Apple
summary: The Samsung Galaxy Tab S11 is the brand’s answer to the iPad Air, with its premium design and compact form factor. As with Samsung’s smartphones, the S11 features numerous first-party apps, which vary in their usefulness.
caption: output/2026-07-21/the-closest-thing-to-an-ipad-air-in-android-form-i-was-impressed-by-th.txt
